entries.name: Icebound Fortitude
entries.desc: Your blood freezes, granting immunity to Stun effects and reducing all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Death Strike
entries.desc: Focuses dark power into a strike that deals 53 Physical damage and heals you for 20.00% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 7.0% of maximum health.

entries.name: Raise Dead
entries.desc: Raises a ghoul to fight by your side.  You can have a maximum of one ghoul at a time. Lasts 1 min.

entries.name: Runic Attenuation
entries.desc: Auto attacks have a chance to generate 3 Runic Power.

entries.name: Improved Death Strike
entries.desc: Death Strike's cost is reduced by 10, and its healing is increased by 60%.

entries.name: Mind Freeze
entries.desc: Smash the target's mind with cold, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec.

entries.name: Blinding Sleet
entries.desc:
Targets in a cone in front of you are blinded, causing them to wander disoriented for 5 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

When Blinding Sleet ends, enemies are slowed by 50% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Gloom Ward
entries.desc: Absorbs are 15% more effective on you.

entries.name: March of Darkness
entries.desc: Death's Advance grants an additional 25% movement speed over the first 3 sec.

entries.name: Wraith Walk
entries.desc:
Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70% for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.

entries.name: Unholy Momentum
entries.desc: Increases Haste by 2%.

entries.name: Control Undead
entries.desc: Dominates the target undead creature up to level 71, forcing it to do your bidding for 5 min.

entries.name: Enfeeble
entries.desc: Your ghoul's attacks have a chance to apply Enfeeble, reducing the enemies movement speed by 30% and the damage they deal to you by 12% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Coldthirst
entries.desc: Successfully interrupting an enemy with Mind Freeze grants 10 Runic Power and reduces its cooldown by 3 sec.

entries.name: Proliferating Chill
entries.desc: Chains of Ice affects 1 additional nearby enemy.

entries.name: Permafrost
entries.desc: Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Veteran of the Third War
entries.desc: Stamina increased by 20%.

entries.name: Death Pact
entries.desc: Create a death pact that heals you for 50% of your maximum health, but absorbs incoming healing equal to 30% of your max health for 15 sec.

entries.name: Brittle
entries.desc: Your diseases have a chance to weaken your enemy causing your attacks against them to deal 6% increased damage for 5 sec.

entries.name: Blood Bond
entries.desc: While you are below 50% health, your Ghoul sacrifices 4% of its maximum health to heal you for 1% of your maximum health every sec.

entries.name: Icy Talons
entries.desc: Your Runic Power spending abilities increase your melee attack speed by 6% for 10 sec, stacking up to 3 times.

entries.name: Death Notes
entries.desc: Raise Ally costs 30 less Runic Power.

entries.name: Anti-Magic Zone
entries.desc: Places an Anti-Magic Zone for 6 sec, reducing the magic damage taken by party or raid members by 15%.

entries.name: Death Defiance
entries.desc: The cooldown of Death Pact is reduced by 30 sec, and you receive 50% increased healing while its healing absorb is active.

entries.name: Unholy Bond
entries.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Runeforge effects by 20%.

entries.name: Ice Prison
entries.desc: Chains of Ice now also roots enemies for 4 sec but its cooldown is increased to 12 sec.

entries.name: Asphyxiate
entries.desc: Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

entries.name: Death's Reach
entries.desc:
Increases the range of Death Grip by 10 yds.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Death Grip.

entries.name: Assimilation
entries.desc: The cooldown of Anti-Magic Zone is reduced by 60 sec and its duration is increased by 2 sec.

entries.name: Anti-Magic Barrier
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Anti-Magic Shell by 20 sec and increases its duration and amount absorbed by 40%.

entries.name: Grip of the Dead
entries.desc: Death and Decay reduces the movement speed of enemies within its area by 90%, decaying by 10% every sec.

entries.name: Suppression
entries.desc: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%. When suffering a loss of control effect, this bonus is increased by an additional 6% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Blood Scent
entries.desc: Increases Leech by 3%.

entries.name: Unholy Endurance
entries.desc: Increases Lichborne duration by 2 sec and reduces the cooldown by 30 sec.

entries.name: Osmosis
entries.desc: Anti-Magic Shell increases healing received by 15%.

entries.name: Insidious Chill
entries.desc: Your auto-attacks reduce the target's auto-attack speed by 5% for 30 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

entries.name: Runic Protection
entries.desc: Your chance to be critically struck is reduced by 3% and your Armor is increased by 6%.

entries.name: Blood Draw
entries.desc:
When you fall below 30% health you drain 42 health from nearby enemies, the damage you take is reduced by 10% and your Death Strike cost is reduced by 10 for 8 sec.

Can only occur every 2 min.

entries.name: Rune Mastery
entries.desc: Consuming a Rune has a chance to increase your Strength by 3% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Subduing Grasp
entries.desc: When you would pull an enemy, the damage they deal to you is reduced by 6% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Will of the Necropolis
entries.desc: Damage taken below 30% Health is reduced by 20%.

entries.name: Null Magic
entries.desc: Magic damage taken is reduced by 8% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%.

entries.name: Unyielding Will
entries.desc: Anti-Magic Shell now removes all harmful magical effects when activated, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

entries.name: Death's Echo
entries.desc: Death's Advance, Death and Decay, and Death Grip have 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Vestigial Shell
entries.desc: Casting Anti-Magic Shell grants 2 nearby allies a Lesser Anti-Magic Shell that Absorbs up to 148 magic damage and reduces the duration of harmful Magic effects against them by 50%.

entries.name: Heart Strike
entries.desc: Instantly strike the target and 1 other nearby enemy, causing 55 Physical damage, and reducing enemies' movement speed by 20% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Marrowrend
entries.desc:
Smash the target, dealing 51 Physical damage and generating 3 charges of Bone Shield.

 Bone Shield
Surrounds you with a barrier of whirling bones, increasing Armor by 110. Each melee attack against you consumes a charge. Lasts 30 sec or until all charges are consumed.

entries.name: Blood Boil
entries.desc:
Deals 57 Shadow damage and infects all enemies within 10 yds with Blood Plague.

 Blood Plague
A shadowy disease that drains 93 health from the target over 24 sec.

entries.name: Vampiric Blood
entries.desc: Embrace your undeath, increasing your maximum health by 30% and increasing all healing and absorbs received by 30% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Bone Collector
entries.desc:
When you would pull an enemy generate 1 charge of Bone Shield.

 Bone Shield
Surrounds you with a barrier of whirling bones, increasing Armor by 110. Each melee attack against you consumes a charge. Lasts 30 sec or until all charges are consumed.

entries.name: Ossuary
entries.desc:
While you have at least 5 Bone Shield charges, the cost of Death Strike is reduced by 5 Runic Power.

Additionally, your maximum Runic Power is increased by 10.

entries.name: Improved Vampiric Blood
entries.desc: Vampiric Blood's healing and absorb amount is increased by 5% and duration by 2 sec.

entries.name: Improved Heart Strike
entries.desc: Heart Strike damage increased by 15%.

entries.name: Relish in Blood
entries.desc: While Crimson Scourge is active, your next Death and Decay heals you for 10 health per Bone Shield charge and you immediately gain 10 Runic Power.

entries.name: Leeching Strike
entries.desc: Heart Strike heals you for 0.25% health for each enemy hit while affected by Blood Plague.

entries.name: Heartbreaker
entries.desc: Your Heart Strike generates 2 additional Runic Power per target hit.

entries.name: Foul Bulwark
entries.desc: Each charge of Bone Shield increases your maximum health by 1%.

entries.name: Dancing Rune Weapon
entries.desc:
Summons a rune weapon for 8 sec that mirrors your melee attacks and bolsters your defenses.

While active, you gain 25% parry chance.

entries.name: Hemostasis
entries.desc: Each enemy hit by Blood Boil increases the damage and healing done by your next Death Strike by 8%, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Perseverance of the Ebon Blade
entries.desc: When Crimson Scourge is consumed, you gain 6% Versatility for 6 sec.

entries.name: Bloodworms
entries.desc:
Your auto attacks have a chance to summon a Bloodworm.

Bloodworms deal minor damage to your target for 15 sec and then burst, healing you for 15% of your missing health.

If you drop below 50% health, your Bloodworms will immediately burst and heal you.

entries.name: Gorefiend's Grasp
entries.desc: Shadowy tendrils coil around all enemies within 15 yards of a hostile or friendly target, pulling them to the target's location and Silencing them for 3 sec.

entries.name: Abomination Limb
entries.desc:
Sprout an additional limb, pulling enemies further than 8 yds from you every 1 sec.  

The same enemy can only be pulled once every 4 sec.

entries.name: Improved Bone Shield
entries.desc: Bone Shield increases your Haste by 10% and it can stack 2 additional times.

entries.name: Insatiable Blade
entries.desc: Dancing Rune Weapon's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec and now generates 5 Bone Shield charges.

entries.name: Deadly Reach
entries.desc: Death Strike hits an additional 2 enemies at 75% effectiveness.

entries.name: Rapid Decomposition
entries.desc:
Your Blood Plague and Death and Decay deal damage 15% more often.

Additionally, your Blood Plague leeches 50% more Health.

entries.name: Boiling Point
entries.desc: Heart Strike has a chance to make your next Blood Boil empowered, dealing 50% increased damage and echoing after 3 sec.

entries.name: Lifeblood
entries.desc: Death Strike heals for an additional 20% of its healing over 5 sec.

entries.name: Everlasting Bond
entries.desc: Summons 1 additional copy of Dancing Rune Weapon and increases its duration by 4 sec.

entries.name: Voracious
entries.desc: Death Strike's healing is increased by 5% and grants you 12% Leech for 8 sec.

entries.name: Blood Feast
entries.desc: Anti-Magic Shell heals you for 100% of the damage it absorbs.

entries.name: Plague Infusion
entries.desc: Your Blood Plague critical hits have a chance to reduce the cooldown of your Blood Boil by 0.25 sec.

entries.name: Bloody Reflection
entries.desc: While Blood Shield is active, taking direct damage reflects 38 Shadow damage back to the attacker. Blood Shield can now absorb up to 65% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Iron Heart
entries.desc: Blood Shield's duration is increased by 2 sec and it absorbs 20% more damage.

entries.name: Bloodied Blade
entries.desc:
Parrying an attack grants you a charge of Bloodied Blade, increasing your Strength by 0.5%, up to 4.0% for 15 sec.

At 8 stacks, your next parry consumes all charges to unleash a Heart Strike at 300% effectiveness, and increases your Strength by 10% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Coagulopathy
entries.desc: Enemies affected by Blood Plague take 5% increased damage from you and Death Strike increases the damage of your Blood Plague by 10% for 15 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

entries.name: Blood Mist
entries.desc:
When you cast Dancing Rune Weapon, you become enveloped in a blood mist that surrounds you for 8 sec, increasing your Parry by 5%. 

Deals 22 Shadow damage every 1 sec to enemies within 10 yds. Every time it deals damage you gain 2 Runic Power, up to a maximum of 10 Runic Power. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Sanguine Ground
entries.desc: You deal 6% more damage and receive 5% more healing while standing in your Death and Decay.

entries.name: Bloodshot
entries.desc: While Blood Shield is active, you deal 8% increased damage.

entries.name: Consumption
entries.desc:
Empower the runes in your weapon, reducing the damage you take over the duration and unleashing a devastating attack that deals 218 Shadow damage and consumes up to 75% of your Blood Plague instantly from enemies in front of you.

I: Consumes up to 25% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 5% and an additional 8 sec after empowering.

II: Consumes up to 50% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 10% and an additional 4 sec after empowering.

III: Consumes up to 75% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 15% and an additional 2 sec after empowering.

entries.name: Red Thirst
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown on Vampiric Blood by 2.0 sec per 10 Runic Power spent.

entries.name: Sanguinary Burst
entries.desc: When Blood Mist ends it deals 94 Shadow damage to 8 nearby enemies, healing you for 15% of the damage dealt. The damage is increased by 2% for every 1 Runic Power spent while Blood Mist was active.

entries.name: Purgatory
entries.desc:
An unholy pact that prevents fatal damage, instead absorbing incoming healing equal to the damage prevented, lasting 3 sec.

If any healing absorption remains when this effect expires, you will die. This effect may only occur every 4 min.

entries.name: Carnage
entries.desc:
Consumption now contributes to your Mastery: Blood Shield.

Each time an enemy strikes your Blood Shield, the cooldown of Consumption has chance to be reset.

entries.name: Umbilicus Eternus
entries.desc: After Vampiric Blood expires, you absorb damage equal to 5 times the damage your Blood Plague dealt during Vampiric Blood.

entries.name: Dance of Midnight
entries.desc: While Dancing Rune Weapon is active, Parrying an attack has a chance to make your next Heart Strike cost no Runes and deal 150% increased damage.

entries.name: Infliction of Sorrow
entries.desc: When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your plagues, it extends the duration of the plagues by 3.0 sec, and deals 10% of the remaining damage to the enemy.

entries.name: Incite Terror
entries.desc:
Vampiric Strike and Scourge Strike cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec.

Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness.

entries.name: Inevitable
entries.desc: Your plagues deal up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health.

entries.name: The Blood is Life
entries.desc:
Dark Transformation summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec.

Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 25% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Blood-Soaked Ground
entries.desc: While you are within your Death and Decay, your physical damage taken is reduced by 5% and your chance to gain Vampiric Strike is increased by 5%.

entries.name: Desecrate
entries.desc: Death and Decay deals its damage 100% faster.

entries.name: Vampiric Strike
entries.desc:
Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 25% chance to make your next Scourge Strike become Vampiric Strike.

Vampiric Strike heals you for 2% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 1.0%, up to 5.0% for 20 sec.

entries.name: Gift of the San'layn
entries.desc:
While Dark Transformation is active you gain Gift of the San'layn.

Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 200%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your Scourge Strike for the duration.

entries.name: Pact of the San'layn
entries.desc: You store 10% of all Shadow damage dealt into your Blood Beast to explode for additional damage when it expires.

entries.name: Sanguine Scent
entries.desc: Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health.

entries.name: Vampiric Aura
entries.desc:
Your Leech is increased by 2%.

While Lichborne is active, the Leech bonus of this effect is increased by 100%, and it affects 4 allies within 12 yds.

entries.name: Bloody Fortitude
entries.desc:
Icebound Fortitude reduces all damage you take by up to an additional 20% based on your missing health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor reduces the cooldown of Icebound Fortitude by 3 sec.

entries.name: Newly Turned
entries.desc: Raise Ally revives players at full health and grants you and your ally an absorb shield equal to 20% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Vampiric Speed
entries.desc:
Death's Advance and Wraith Walk movement speed bonuses are increased by 10%.

Activating Death's Advance or Wraith Walk increases 4 nearby allies movement speed by 20% for 5 sec.

entries.name: Frenzied Bloodthirst
entries.desc: Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil and Death Strike by 5%, and Epidemic by 5% per stack.

entries.name: Transfusion
entries.desc:
Vampiric Strike increases the damage of your Dancing Rune Weapons by 20% for 8 sec. 

Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: Thrill of Blood
entries.desc:
Essence of the Blood Queen additionally increases your Mastery by 1.0% per stack.

Blood Plague deals 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Visceral Strength
entries.desc: When Sudden Doom is consumed, you gain 4% Strength for 5 sec.

entries.name: Swift and Painful
entries.desc:
If no enemies are struck by Soul Rupture, you gain 10% Strength for 8 sec.

Wave of Souls is 100% more effective on the main target of your Reaper's Mark.

entries.name: Grim Reaper
entries.desc:
Reaper's Mark initial strike grants Killing Machine.

Reaper's Mark explosion deals up to 30% increased damage based on your target's missing health.

entries.name: Pact of the Deathbringer
entries.desc:
When you suffer a damaging effect equal to 25% of your maximum health, you instantly cast Death Pact at 50% effectiveness. May only occur every 2 min.

When a Reaper's Mark explodes, the cooldowns of this effect and Death Pact are reduced by 5 sec.

entries.name: Rune Carved Plates
entries.desc: Each Rune spent reduces the magic damage you take by 1.5% and each Rune generated reduces the physical damage you take by 1.5% for 5 sec, up to 5 times.

entries.name: Wave of Souls
entries.desc:
Reaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing 34 Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path.

Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take 5% increased Shadowfrost damage for 15 sec, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back.

entries.name: Bind in Darkness
entries.desc:
Rime empowered Howling Blast deals 60% increased damage to its main target, and is now Shadowfrost.

Shadowfrost damage applies 2 stacks to Reaper's Mark and 4 stacks when it is a critical strike.

entries.name: Death's Messenger
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldowns of Lichborne and Raise Dead by 30 sec.

entries.name: Expelling Shield
entries.desc: When an enemy deals direct damage to your Anti-Magic Shell, their cast speed is reduced by 10% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Dark Talons
entries.desc:
Consuming Killing Machine or Rime has a 25% chance to grant 3 stacks of Icy Talons and increase its maximum stacks by the same amount for 6 sec.

Runic Power spending abilities count as Shadowfrost while Icy Talons is active.

entries.name: Reaper's Onslaught
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Reaper's Mark by 15 sec, but the amount of Obliterates and Frostscythes empowered by Exterminate is reduced by 1.

entries.name: Wither Away
entries.desc: Frost Fever deals its damage 100% faster, and the second scythe of Exterminate applies Frost Fever.

entries.name: Soul Rupture
entries.desc: When Reaper's Mark explodes, it deals 20% of the damage dealt to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Reaper's Mark
entries.desc:
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing 109 Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing 14 damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

entries.name: Exterminate
entries.desc:
After Reaper's Mark explodes, your next 2 Obliterates or Frostscythes cost 1 Rune and summon 2 scythes to strike your enemies.

The first scythe strikes your target for 188 Shadowfrost damage and the second scythe strikes all enemies around your target for 74 Shadowfrost damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Echoing Fury
entries.desc:
Reaper's Mark deals 5% increased damage.

Casting Dancing Rune Weapon grants 1 stack of Exterminate with 100% first scythe and 100% second scythe effectiveness.

entries.name: Deathly Blows
entries.desc: Death Strike damage increased by 12%.

entries.name: Frigid Resolve
entries.desc:
The effectiveness of Permafrost is increased by 100% and Exterminate grants Permafrost equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

Permafrost
Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.
